title: Mauricio Rodríguez
metaDescription: Fullstack Developer — portfolio of projects and contact.
intro: Fullstack Developer and 20-year-old systems engineering student, passionate about programming, with other hobbies such as drawing, working out, and listening to music.
I hope to become a great Fullstack Developer.
featuredDescription: A curated selection of the most relevant and significant projects that have shaped my professional journey as a developer.
educationFooter: I have learned a great deal about programming thanks to numerous content creators such as Midudev, FreeCodeCamp, among others, and also to university professors who taught me. Moreover, I have used artificial intelligence to study related topics more easily.

educationData.title: Systems Engineering
educationData.description: I chose this degree because I have always been fascinated by programming; through it I have learned to create, use, and maintain any system with my own hands. I am currently in the final stage, about to graduate as an engineer.
educationData.place: Universidad Nacional Experimental de la Fuerza Armada (UNEFA)

educationData.title: High School Diploma in Science
educationData.description: During high school I didn’t study programming, yet I found myself drawn to it, spending hours configuring Minecraft server plugins with the help of the documentation. Rather than the game itself, I was fascinated by seeing everything I wrote work. It’s funny how it all started, haha!

noProjects: No featured projects to show yet
